verse: A sahuagin warrior, undone by his own laughter
annotation: Vicious Mockery · the joke was cruel, and the tide heard it

verse: A bandit upon the bloodied deck
annotation: shoved into the cold, where no rope could find him

verse: A pirate who did not rise with the tide
annotation: pushed beneath the waterline · saltwater his last hymn

verse: A sahuagin warrior, opened like a tide-pool
annotation: Scimitar · one arc, one answer

verse: A sahuagin warrior, who swam no further
annotation: Shortsword · close work, finished clean

verse: A bandit felled in the pirate's wake
annotation: Scimitar · steel where steel was owed

verse: A sahuagin warrior, bell-tolled into silence
annotation: Toll the Dead · the dead already knew her voice

verse: A bandit unraveled by three darts of light
annotation: Magic Missile · no hiding from what cannot miss

verse: A pirate called home by a bell he could not hear
annotation: Toll the Dead · the second time it struck, he fell

verse: A bandit briefly lit by arcane fire
annotation: Eldritch Blast · the patron's small attention, spent

verse: Two shambling dead put down in the streets outside the walls
annotation: Heavy Crossbow · two bolts, two stilled frames, by the alarm-light

verse: Dead flesh met iron in Malar's Throat and stayed down
annotation: Warhammer · close work, twice over, amid the temple's raised alarm

verse: A zombie unraveled at range, arrow in the ruin of its chest
annotation: Longbow · the dead do not outrun a drawn shaft

verse: Bone met fire and lost; a skeleton unmade in the flame
annotation: Breath Weapon (Fire) · the flame came from within, not from a torch

verse: Two skeletons scattered, their borrowed motion cut short
annotation: Scimitar · the blade found the joints and the joints gave

verse: Three zombies taken apart by light that does not miss
annotation: Magic Missile · unerring and cold, one dart per dead thing

verse: Two skeletons lit and stilled in the heat of Malar's Throat
annotation: Fire Bolt · dry bone catches fast; ash is the end of all walking

verse: A ghoul ended by the sound of its own knell
annotation: Toll the Dead · the bell rang for it, and the ghoul had no answer

verse: Two zombies unmade by force that carries no name
annotation: Eldritch Blast · the dead were still new enough to shatter

verse: A skeleton struck and scattered across the Throat's stones
annotation: Eldritch Blast · bone and void met in the dark — bone lost

verse: Two skeletons loosed from service by arrows they never heard
annotation: Longbow · the arc was short; the end was not
